steps.title: Identify the purpose signal
steps.content:
The passage first explains why scholars focus on certain juvenilia (famous authors' unpublished work reveals artistic development), then adds another reason (lesser-known writers' published work is essential to understanding history).

This two-part structure of presenting reasons is the key signal of the passage's purpose.

steps.title: Match to the choices
steps.content:
Choice D directly states this purpose: to present reasons why scholars consider juvenilia valuable.

Choices A, B, and C describe different aims—publishing challenges, merit comparison between specific authors, and young versus adult accomplishments—that the passage does not address.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
